title: Property-Pi — Phase 1 Sub-Plan
summary: Detailed sub-plan for Phase 1 MVP covering setup, unit/tenant/lease management, rent tracking, and dashboard implementation.
notes: Superseded by ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md - plan assumes Prisma/PostgreSQL/NextAuth stack which is now obsolete
key_points: Phase 1 broken into 7 sub-tasks: setup, unit mgmt, tenant mgmt, lease mgmt, rent tracking, dashboard, data seeding
Each task has detailed checklist with API routes, pages, and components
1.2 Unit Management: CRUD with visual card grid, status tracking, API routes
1.3 Tenant Management: CRUD with search, profile views, payment history
1.4 Lease Management: CRUD with lifecycle status (active/expired/terminated/renewal_pending)
1.5 Rent Tracking: Monthly generation, mark-paid workflow, overdue indicators
1.7 Data Seeding: prisma/seed.ts with realistic demo data
conflicts_with: ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md (entire data layer and auth approach changed)
